text: 4. **Deterministic ownership of direct mentions** in the dual-delivery case (a tmux session also fires hooks): the hooks path (`assemble_turn_start_context`) should skip the mention block when the session has a **live tmux pane** (paste owns it) and render **only** ambient ④. In practice the paste drains the inbox first so it mostly self-dedups, but gating on "no live pane" makes the *format* deterministic instead of race-dependent.
